info.description: Comprehensive API for monitoring and managing NATS JetStream instances.
info.title: NATS Monitoring API

get.description: Returns all configured alert definitions

post.description: Evaluates all enabled alert conditions immediately and returns how many triggered

get.description: Returns triggered alert instances, optionally filtered

post.description: Acknowledges one or more triggers for the given alert ID

delete.description: Deletes an alert configuration by ID

get.description: Returns a single alert configuration by ID
Returns connection and JetStream health status of the cluster
Returns JetStream cluster topology and server information
Returns information about each node in the NATS cluster
Returns replication, mirror, source, and cluster placement info for a stream

get.summary: List all consumers across all streams
Get consumer by name across all streams

get.description: Opens a Server-Sent Events stream of traffic for the given subjects

post.description: Publishes a message to a NATS subject (non-JetStream)
Publishes a request message and waits for a reply (request/reply pattern)

get.description: Returns connection and server discovery information for the NATS cluster
Opens a Server-Sent Events stream of messages published to the given subject
Returns connection status and active subscription information
Opens a Server-Sent Events stream for real-time stream/consumer/dashboard updates
Exports a summary of all streams as JSON
Exports stream data in the requested format (json, csv, txt)
Exports consumer data in the requested format (json, csv, txt)

post.description: Exports messages from a stream, optionally filtered by subject, as JSON

get.description: Returns a summary report of all streams with latest metric values
Returns historical metric data points for a stream
Returns statistical analysis (min/max/avg/trend) of a stream metric
Returns all JetStream Key-Value store buckets

post.description: Creates a new JetStream Key-Value store bucket

delete.description: Deletes a JetStream Key-Value store bucket

get.description: Returns detailed information about a single KV bucket
Returns the revision history of a single key in a KV bucket

delete.description: Deletes a key from a KV bucket

get.description: Returns the value and revision of a single key in a KV bucket

put.description: Creates or updates a key in a KV bucket

get.description: Returns all keys (with values and revisions) in a KV bucket
get.summary: List keys in a KV bucket

post.description: Removes all deleted-key tombstones from a KV bucket

get.description: Lists messages from a stream. This endpoint currently returns 501 until message retrieval is implemented.
Returns paginated messages from a stream.
Returns collected stream metrics series, optionally filtered by stream, type and duration
Returns collected metric series for a specific stream
Returns lag, delivery, and ack metrics for a specific consumer
Returns audit log entries
Returns server details and connection security (auth/TLS) status
Returns account information, limits, and server security settings
Returns NATS users (not implemented)

parameters.description: Maximum number of messages to return
parameters.name: limit

get.summary: Get pending messages for a consumer

post.summary: Publish a message to a stream

delete.summary: Delete a message from a stream

get.description: Returns all configured multi-tenancy NATS connections

post.description: Creates a new multi-tenancy NATS connection configuration
Attempts to connect to a NATS URL and reports connectivity and latency

delete.description: Deletes a multi-tenancy NATS connection configuration (the default connection cannot be deleted)

get.description: Returns a single configured NATS connection by ID

put.description: Updates an existing multi-tenancy NATS connection configuration

get.description: Marks a connection as the default NATS connection
Returns the connectivity status of all configured connections
